overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses busy intersections, and walks beneath elevated highways in a vibrant cyberpunk metropolis with neon signage, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban architecture under overcast skies.

events.description: approaching crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a distinctive pink and green commercial building, approaching a street crossing

notable_agents.action: woman in school uniform walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive art deco style building with pink walls and green trim, large corner structure
zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt ahead
tall cylindrical digital display showing rotating advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street median in the distance
scattered trash and debris along the sidewalk and street edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk approaching a crosswalk, passing by a distinctive pink commercial building on the left. Digital advertising pillars and palm trees line the street while scattered pedestrians share the walkway. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the urban scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with elevated highway ramps

events.description: waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass before proceeding across the street
crossing the wide multi-lane street with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating across the busy intersection with a group of pedestrians, weaving between slow-moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sports car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: massive concrete highway ramp structure with red accents rising above the street
tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
sleek green cyberpunk-style car with glowing accents waiting at the light
tall traffic signal with pink illuminated housing and yellow walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection beneath an elevated highway ramp, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. Futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic lights while large digital billboards tower overhead. The scene opens up to show the full sky and dense cluster of skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with heavy traffic flow

events.description: walking beneath the massive elevated highway structure into the covered underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the dense stream of traffic flowing below the overpass

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street traffic
row of parked cyberpunk-style vehicles including a white sedan and green coupe
ground level commercial storefronts with concrete facades beginning to appear

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway overpass where the sky is partially obscured by concrete infrastructure. Dense traffic flows along the multi-lane road separated by green barriers, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The environment transitions from open intersection to the sheltered underpass with shop fronts beginning to line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian zone with neon storefronts

events.description: passing by illuminated neon storefronts and holographic advertising displays

agents.ego_description: strolling past vibrant neon-lit shops and digital displays in a commercial pedestrian zone under the highway

notable_agents.action: woman in gold outfit standing near the shop entrance looking at displays

entered.detail: storefront with prominent yellow neon 'RIOT' signage and glowing window displays
retail display windows showing holographic advertisements and merchandise
dense cluster of colorful neon signs and digital displays above the shops
elevated pedestrian bridge or walkway connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a vibrant commercial area beneath the elevated highway, passing neon-lit storefronts including a prominent shop with 'RIOT' signage. Holographic displays illuminate the sidewalk while the massive concrete overpass continues overhead. The scene blends the sheltered urban infrastructure with bright commercial lighting and scattered pedestrians browsing the shops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban corridor that transitions from an open city sidewalk into a sheltered, neon-lit commercial district beneath a massive highway. It begins with the character walking past a pink commercial building and digital advertising pillars under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the view expands to reveal a dense cluster of distant skyscrapers and futuristic vehicles waiting beneath an elevated highway ramp. The scene then shifts as the camera moves under the heavy concrete infrastructure of the overpass, where the open sky is replaced by the shadow of multi-lane roads and green barriers. Finally, the environment transforms into a vibrant shopping area, passing holographic displays and neon-lit storefronts, including a prominent RIOT sign, while the massive overpass continues to loom overhead.
